evals.prompt: Generate a safety-railed deployment script for app mysvc with an artifact and health URL.

assertions.text: config lands as an env-overridable default (no inlined secret)

assertions.cmd: python -c "import sys; c=open('.skill-validation/deploy.sh',encoding='utf-8').read(); need=['--dry-run','do_build()','do_release()','do_rollback()','do_health_check()']; sys.exit(0 if (c.startswith('#!/usr/bin/env bash') and all(n in c for n in need)) else 1)"
assertions.text: is a strict-mode scaffold with dry-run and all four subcommands

evals.prompt: Print the deploy script to stdout.
